pokemon:arboliva.name: Arboliva
pokemon:arboliva.summary: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.
This Pokémon drives back enemies by launching its rich, aromatic oil at them with enough force to smash a boulder.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.

pokemon:dolliv.name: Dolliv
pokemon:dolliv.summary: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.
It basks in the sun to its heart’s content until the fruits on its head ripen. After that, Dolliv departs from human settlements and goes on a journey.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.

pokemon:smoliv.name: Smoliv
pokemon:smoliv.summary: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.
This Pokémon converts nutrients into oil, which it stores in the fruit on its head. It can easily go a whole week without eating or drinking.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.
